glosses.yue: 風格上的; 文體上的
glosses.vi: thuộc phong cách; thuộc văn phong
glosses.ja: 文体的; スタイル上の

sentences.target: Das klingt stilistisch nicht ganz passend.

translations.de: Das klingt stilistisch nicht ganz passend.
translations.en: That doesn't sound quite right stylistically.
translations.es: No suena del todo bien en cuanto al estilo.
translations.fr: Ça ne sonne pas tout à fait juste au niveau du style.
translations.it: A livello di stile, non va del tutto bene.
translations.zh-Hans: 从风格上说，这听起来不太合适。
translations.yue: 就風格嚟講，聽落唔太啱。
translations.ru: С точки зрения стиля это звучит не совсем удачно.
translations.pt: Não soa muito bem em termos de estilo.
translations.he: מבחינת הסגנון זה לא נשמע לגמרי נכון.
translations.vi: Xét về mặt phong cách, nghe không thật ổn.
translations.ar: من ناحية الأسلوب، هذا لا يبدو مناسبًا تمامًا.
translations.nl: Stilistisch klinkt het niet helemaal goed.
translations.uk: З погляду стилю це звучить не зовсім вдало.
translations.hi: शैली के हिसाब से यह पूरी तरह ठीक नहीं लगता.
translations.pl: Pod względem stylu nie brzmi to do końca dobrze.
translations.el: Από άποψη ύφους δεν ακούγεται και τόσο σωστό.
translations.nb: Stilistisk høres det ikke helt riktig ut.
translations.id: Secara gaya, kedengarannya tidak terlalu pas.
translations.sv: Stilistiskt låter det inte helt rätt.
translations.ro: Din punct de vedere stilistic, nu sună chiar bine.
translations.cs: Po stylistické stránce to nezní úplně dobře.
translations.da: Stilistisk lyder det ikke helt rigtigt.
translations.fi: Tyylillisesti se ei kuulosta ihan oikealta.
translations.ja: 文体的にちょっとしっくりきません。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the subject, referring to a previously mentioned situation or content.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); takes a predicative complement expressing an impression.
Adverb of manner specifying the stylistic dimension of the evaluation.
Negation particle scoping over the predicate phrase.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective ‘passend’.
Predicative adjective serving as complement to ‘klingt’ (how it sounds).

translations.es: Tu texto está bien en cuanto al estilo.
translations.fr: Ton texte est correct sur le plan stylistique.
translations.it: Il tuo testo è a posto a livello di stile.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的文字在风格上没问题。
translations.yue: 你篇文喺風格上冇問題。
translations.pt: Seu texto está bem em termos de estilo.
translations.vi: Về mặt phong cách, bài viết của bạn ổn.
translations.nl: Qua stijl is je tekst prima.
translations.hi: शैली के लिहाज़ से तुम्हारा पाठ ठीक है.
translations.pl: Pod względem stylu twój tekst jest w porządku.
translations.el: Από άποψη ύφους, το κείμενό σου είναι εντάξει.
translations.nb: Stilmessig er teksten din helt grei.
translations.ro: Din punct de vedere stilistic, textul tău e în regulă.
translations.cs: Po stylistické stránce je tvůj text v pořádku.
translations.ja: 文体的には、あなたの文章は問題ありません。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying ‘Text’.
Noun serving as the subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate.
Adverbial modifier specifying the stylistic aspect of the predicate.
Predicative adjective serving as subject complement after the copula.

sentences.target: Das Bild wirkt stilistisch sehr ruhig.

translations.de: Das Bild wirkt stilistisch sehr ruhig.
translations.en: The picture feels stylistically very calm.
translations.es: La imagen tiene un estilo muy sereno.
translations.fr: Le tableau a un style très calme.
translations.it: Il quadro ha uno stile molto pacato.
translations.ko: 그 그림은 스타일 면에서 아주 차분하게 느껴져요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这幅画在风格上非常宁静。
translations.pt: O quadro tem um estilo muito tranquilo.
translations.vi: Bức tranh có phong cách rất nhẹ nhàng.
translations.ar: اللوحة هادئة جدًا من حيث الأسلوب.
translations.nl: Het schilderij is qua stijl heel rustig.
translations.hi: शैली के लिहाज़ से चित्र बहुत शांत है.
translations.pl: Obraz jest pod względem stylu bardzo spokojny.
translations.el: Ο πίνακας είναι πολύ ήρεμος ως προς το ύφος.
translations.nb: Bildet er veldig rolig i stilen.
translations.id: Gaya lukisan ini terasa sangat tenang.
translations.sv: Tavlan är väldigt lugn i stilen.
translations.ro: Tabloul are un stil foarte liniștit.
translations.da: Maleriet er meget roligt i stilen.
translations.ja: この絵は作風がとても穏やかです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article determining the noun ‘Bild’.
Noun functioning as the subject.
Finite main verb meaning ‘appears/seems’, taking an adjectival predicate.
Adverbial modifier narrowing the evaluation to the stylistic domain.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective ‘ruhig’.
Predicative adjective serving as complement to ‘wirkt’.

sentences.target: Das passt stilistisch nicht zu mir.

translations.de: Das passt stilistisch nicht zu mir.
translations.es: Eso no va con mi estilo.
translations.fr: Ça ne correspond pas à mon style.
translations.it: Non si adatta al mio stile.
translations.pt: Isso não combina com o meu estilo.
translations.vi: Cái này không hợp với phong cách của tôi.
translations.nl: Dat past niet bij mijn stijl.
translations.hi: यह मेरी शैली के अनुरूप नहीं है.
translations.pl: To nie pasuje do mojego stylu.
translations.el: Αυτό δεν ταιριάζει στο στιλ μου.
translations.nb: Det passer ikke til stilen min.
translations.id: Ini tidak cocok dengan gaya saya.
translations.ro: Nu se potrivește cu stilul meu.
translations.cs: To se nehodí k mému stylu.
translations.da: Det passer ikke til min stil.
translations.ja: これは自分のスタイルに合いません。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the subject.
Finite main verb meaning ‘to fit/suit’; subcategorizes for a ‘zu’ + dative complement.
Adverb of manner specifying the stylistic sense of fitting.
Negation particle negating the predicate.
Preposition governing dative; forms a prepositional complement to ‘passt’.
Personal pronoun (1st person singular, dative) as the object of ‘zu’.
